title: EVA 00
wikitext:
[]: EVA 00             Quote Post by Hand of God » Fri Apr 08, 2005 7:13 pm when eva 00 self-destruct herself why after sometime the eva when white and with wings?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 08, 2005 8:53 pm White and with wings? She became a Giant Naked Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Fri Apr 08, 2005 9:27 pm Or the "LGNR": Lesser Giant Naked Rei heh...

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Fri Apr 08, 2005 10:51 pm ESL?

[]: Re: EVA 00             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Apr 09, 2005 11:24 am Hand of God wrote: when eva 00 self-destruct herself why after sometime the eva when white and with wings?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Apr 09, 2005 12:25 pm The mass that boils out of Eva-00's core a little before this is a protean mixture of the previous angels; and we have seen Rei's shape informing Armisael during the confrontation. In order to contain the angel, Rei has had to absorb it, and presumably its mutability of shape. I don't know which mentality it was taking on the final shape - Rei being herself or Armisael beseeching someone as if it were Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 09, 2005 12:36 pm The transformation never made much sense to me. EVA-00 simply fades over to a giant Rei (the armor, cable, etc., just disappears), hardly like the morphing we see elsewhere in the show. It doesn't seem quite "real".

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Apr 09, 2005 2:27 pm I always thought that Director's Cut Episodes exist for one reason:Clear up some things..Now i know i'm wrong.. The transformation also doesn't make sense to me,i guess it has a symbolic meaning too..

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Apr 09, 2005 3:41 pm Reichu wrote: The transformation never made much sense to me. EVA-00 simply fades over to a giant Rei (the armor, cable, etc., just disappears), hardly like the morphing we see elsewhere in the show. It doesn't seem quite "real".

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Apr 09, 2005 5:48 pm It's symbolic. One could get lost forever in the pedantics of Eva transmorphology. It's best not to. Cracking good scene though!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 09, 2005 7:06 pm Shin-seiki wrote: It's an "X-Ray vision" type of deal, i.e. what was happening to Zero beneath the armor.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Apr 09, 2005 7:56 pm It's a bizzare transformation for the purpose of relating a transformation. If Eva-00 had two eyes, it would have been possible to simply have a close-up of the eyes as they morph into Rei's, and it would have had the same meaning. But she doesn't, so they didn't. The fact that it doesn't make physical sense doesn't really hold the most weight with Evangelion. Take two acid and think of something important.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Apr 09, 2005 8:15 pm Armisael is the Angel of the womb. It foremost illustrates the connectedness of the previous Angels (unless it was more artistic than functional), as well as the potential of the Angels' forms. When Rei/Adam/Lilith merge in End of Eva, they take on the appearance of Rei. Similarly, the same occurs in 23'. Eva Unit 00, Rei, and Armisael fuse together and look similar to GNR. I don't think this is purely symbolic, nor do I think this means something profound. I simply think that what we see is what Armisael would have ultimately become if Rei hadn't chosen to self destruct Unit 00 LGNR is the mature "gestation" of Armisael. My two cents...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 09, 2005 9:07 pm Yeah, but, like, that pink blobbish stuff (that came bursting out of the core) that Armisael was "converted into", like, imploded, and stuff. Was Armisael even still around in any way when this 'mystical transformation' occured? And I still want to know where the armor and umbilical cable went.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Jul 14, 2005 12:07 pm the_seventh_child wrote: I always thought that Director's Cut Episodes exist for one reason:Clear up some things..Now i know i'm wrong.. The transformation also doesn't make sense to me,i guess it has a symbolic meaning too..

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Mon Jul 18, 2005 4:25 pm Hey about unit-0 ... whos soul is in it??? yui is in unit-1, asukas mom is in unit-2, susahara's mom is in unit-3 and mp have randome souls in them.... but who's in poor unit-0?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Mon Jul 18, 2005 4:38 pm TheBlueTree wrote: Hey about unit-0 ... whos soul is in it??? yui is in unit-1, asukas mom is in unit-2, susahara's mom is in unit-3 and mp have randome souls in them.... but who's in poor unit-0?

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Mon Jul 18, 2005 5:04 pm Can anyone post any screencaps of LGNR? I've not seen it yet...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 18, 2005 5:09 pm Buy the NPC episodes. Now. Don't make me use the Jedi Mind Trick.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 18, 2005 7:35 pm lol i always thought it was simply symbolic, seeing as 00's core kind of compacts down to a certain point, so it seems as though the angel was absorbed and somehow digested (the growths that were sprouting also disappeared)
summary:
[]: EVA 00             Quote Post by Hand of God » Fri Apr 08, 2005 7:13 pm when eva 00 self-destruct herself why after sometime the eva when white and with wings?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 08, 2005 8:53 pm White and with wings? She became a Giant Naked Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Fri Apr 08
